reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Los empleados unos mal educados que hablan de mala manera a los clientes. Los precios altos para la calidad y cantidad de los productos del shop. Malísima experiencia.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The employees are rude and speak disrespectfully to customers. The prices are high for the quality and quantity of the products in the shop. A very bad experience.

reviews.comment:
Un lugar que me da garantía de satisfacción y transparencia,lástima que la última vez que fuí no me funciono la app YPF y no pude acceder al descuento ofrecido a sus adheridos

(Translated by Google)
A place that guarantees satisfaction and transparency. It's a shame that the last time I went, the YPF app didn't work and I couldn't access the discount offered to its members.
